---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Describe the problem or use case this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
How you envision this feature working. Include code examples if possible:

```python
# Example of how the feature might be used
agent = CortexAgent(...)
result = agent.new_feature(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Benefits
Who would benefit from this feature? How common is this use case?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have described a clear use case
- [ ] This feature would benefit the general user base (not just my specific use case)
